2605.20470.title: EPC-3D-Diff: Equivariant Physics Consistent Conditional 3D Latent Diffusion for CBCT to CT Synthesis
2605.20470.paper_summary: Cone-beam CT (CBCT) is routinely acquired during radiotherapy for patient setup, but its quantitative reliability is degraded by scatter, noise, and reconstruction artifacts, limiting Hounsfield Unit (HU) accuracy. We propose EPC-3D-Diff, a novel conditional 3D latent diffusion framework for volumetric CBCT to CT synthesis that introduces a projection domain equivariance loss derived from acquisition physics. Unlike common image domain equivariance, we exploit the fact that an in plane rotation of the volume corresponds to an angular shift in its projections. During training, we enforce this relationship by forward projecting rotated synthesized CT volumes and matching them to appropriately angle shifted projections of the paired target CT, yielding a physics consistent equivariance constraint integrated into the diffusion objective. To capture full 3D context efficiently, conditional diffusion is performed in a compact latent space learnt by a lightweight 3D autoencoder, preserving axial depth while downsampling in plane resolution for stable training. We validate on a paired head CBCT/CT phantom dataset, including repeat scans, and paired clinical data using patient wise splits, and perform single and mixed domain training, ablations, and comparisons with diffusion and CycleGAN. EPC-3D-Diff generalizes well and achieved substantial improvements, +7.4 dB (phantom) and +1.8 dB (clinical data) in PSNR compared to state of the art methods, alongside improved SSIM and HU accuracy, within tissue boundaries. Overall, EPC-3D-Diff improves robustness and physics consistency, supporting HU aware synthesis for downstream radiotherapy workflows.
2605.20470.paper_summary_zh: 圓錐束CT（CBCT）在放射治療中常用於病人定位，但其定量可靠性受到散射、噪聲和重建工件的影響，限制了Hounsfield單位（HU）的準確性。我們提出EPC-3D-Diff，一種新穎的條件3D潛在擴散框架，用於體積CBCT到CT的合成，該框架引入了源自獲取物理學的投影域等變損失。與常見的影像域等變性不同，我們利用了體積的平面旋轉對應於其投影的角度偏移的事實。在訓練過程中，我們通過前向投影旋轉的合成CT體積並將其與配對目標CT的適當角度偏移投影進行匹配，強制執行這一關係，從而在擴散目標中集成了一個物理一致的等變性約束。為了有效捕捉完整的3D上下文，條件擴散在由輕量級3D自編碼器學習的緊湊潛在空間中進行，保持軸向深度的同時在平面解析度上進行降採樣，以實現穩定的訓練。我們在配對的頭部CBCT/CT幻影數據集上進行驗證，包括重複掃描，並使用病人為基礎的分割進行配對臨床數據，並執行單一和混合域訓練、消融實驗以及與擴散和CycleGAN的比較。EPC-3D-Diff具有良好的泛化能力，與最先進的方法相比，在PSNR上實現了顯著的改善，幻影數據提升了+7.4 dB，臨床數據提升了+1.8 dB，同時在組織邊界內提高了SSIM和HU準確性。總體而言，EPC-3D-Diff提高了穩健性和物理一致性，支持HU感知合成以用於下游的放射治療工作流程。
2605.20470.author: Alzahra Altalib et.al.
2605.20470.authors: Alzahra Altalib, Chunhui Li, Haytham Al Ewaidat, Khaled Alawneh, Ahmad Qendel, Alessandro Perelli
